nasb.text: How well you prepare your way To seek love! Therefore even the wicked women You have taught your ways.

esv.text: “How well you direct your course to seek love! So that even to wicked women you have taught your ways.

cnv.text: 你多麼通曉門路， 去尋求愛情！ 就連壞女人， 你也可以把門路指教她們。

ccb.text: “你们真善于求爱啊！ 甚至把技巧教给妓女。
